description: Docker-only profile: containers and IaC, no application language. Multi-Dockerfile Hadolint + base-image digest audit run from Sentinel Shield, container image + filesystem scanning (Trivy/Dockle/Checkov). Dockerfiles + hadolint.yaml are project-local. Use this when the repo ships only container/IaC assets; pair with an app-language profile (or a combination) when it also ships application code. NON-OPERATIVE: this manifest declares no `tools` map and no `extends`, so resolve-effective-profile.sh returns ZERO tools for it. The recommended_* arrays below are legacy hints the engine does not consume — no tool is required, run, or gated by this profile. Use hardened-enterprise (which extends laravel+node+docker) or add a `tools` map before relying on it.
